diagrams.title: popen/pclose Process Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the complete lifecycle of popen() and pclose() including fork, pipe creation, and process termination
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete process creation and communication flow

diagrams.title: popen() Mode 'r' Data Flow
diagrams.description: When popen() is called with 'r' mode, shows how data flows from command's stdout to the program's input
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing data direction in read mode - data flows FROM command TO program

diagrams.title: popen() Mode 'w' Data Flow
diagrams.description: When popen() is called with 'w' mode, shows how data flows from program's output to command's stdin
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing data direction in write mode - data flows FROM program TO command

diagrams.title: Zombie Process Prevention with pclose()
diagrams.description: Shows how pclose() prevents zombie processes by calling waitpid() to collect exit status
diagrams.purpose: Understanding why pclose() is essential for proper resource management
